title: OIM Annual Report 2024 to 2025
body: "This is our annual report on the operation of the UK internal market and developments as to the effectiveness of the operation of that market. The report fulfils our statutory reporting requirement under s.33(5) of the UK Internal Market Act 2020.  The annual report presents an overview of data in relation to intra-UK trade and discusses current and upcoming regulatory developments that are affecting, or have the potential to affect, the UK internal market.  OIM Regulatory Developments Dashboard  The OIM has also published an interactive dashboard showing potential regulatory differences in the UK’s internal market that the OIM is tracking, available through the Regulatory developments in the UK internal market home page. "
